criteria.description: The stardust:direct skill was invoked with the freeform phrase as input.

The agent restated the phrase in stardust's dimensional vocabulary (register / expressive axis / tone / density / distinctiveness / audience / constraints) before doing anything else. Each axis is named and either marked as moved (with direction), pinned, or left alone.
The agent explicitly identified what's underspecified before asking questions. 'Young' as too coarse (or equivalent) was called out.
At most TWO clarifying questions were asked. Each had concrete options + an 'other' / 'skip' escape hatch and cited which dimension it resolved.

After answers (or with no questions needed), the agent showed the resolved plan to the user BEFORE running any impeccable command or writing any file. Plan included: one-sentence restatement, assumptions, command sequence with reasoning, pages affected.
Divergence inputs resolved: 4-dim seed (decade x craft x register x ground-family), font deck pick, palette resolution. Recorded in DESIGN.json.extensions.divergence per the v2 storage shape.

PRODUCT.md authored directly at project root using impeccable's teach.md as format spec. The agent did NOT invoke $impeccable teach. Sections present: Register, Users, Product Purpose, Brand Personality, Anti-references, Design Principles, Accessibility & Inclusion.

DESIGN.md and DESIGN.json authored directly at project root. DESIGN.md uses Stitch frontmatter + 6 canonical sections. DESIGN.json schemaVersion 2 with extensions (divergence, componentStyle, voice) and narrative blocks.

stardust/direction.md exists with provenance + YAML frontmatter + # Active direction section containing required sub-sections: Phrase, Restatement, Movements, Divergence inputs, Command sequence (proposed), User confirmation, Pages in scope. Anti-references explicitly written (or '(none)').
stardust/state.json updated: direction.resolvedAt set, direction.phrase verbatim, in-scope pages move from 'extracted' to 'directed' with history entries.
The agent did NOT silently map the phrase to a fixed command lookup. Reasoning was visible (dimensional vocabulary used, command choices justified).
No mention of EDS, AEM, dev servers, or framework targets.
